description: I Hate You, Please Suffer is a heart-filled RPG about paying your rent in a hostile world.

ihyps-v0.2.0.description:
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/chloebangbang/Archipelago/blob/5c7efcc72623b0591bd183e8291ba5c939436e5d/worlds/ihyps/docs/setup_en.md).

* Added a skillsanity option.
* Added the option to disable logic. If you're into that kinda thing.
* Fixed a lot of bugs and messed with a lot of logic.
* Added some more checks too.
ihyps-v0.2.0.title: IHYPS v0.2.0 - Skillsanity and logic fixes

ihyps-v0.3.0.description:
Setup instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/chloebangbang/Archipelago/blob/2c38821b1ffead171642e8ff7e729144844603cc/worlds/ihyps/docs/setup_en.md).

## Added features
- Energy link support!
  - Accessed from your phone while inside your apartment or the bar
  - Conversion rate of 1:7.5e7
  - You are encouraged to immediately take out a $9999 loan from the mob and put it into the energy link to help out another slot. But watch out

## Bug fixes
- No longer allow the player to turn in the sealed envelope without fighting the bonus boss
  - This previously would make the world incompletable, as defeating the bonus boss is currently a requirement
  - This should not have taken me this long
- Fixed logic that previously put scale trade into logic without Devon
- Fixed the lighthouse quest being inaccessible if you already traded the deeds
- Allow the player to turn in bounties after starting the bonus boss quest with a burner phone in inventory
- Made some received item text boxes properly dim
  - I'm going to keep finding incorrectly set text boxes in here until I die probably
- Removed some more hidden calls to achievements that had a possibility of crashing the game
  - Probably none you'd actually run into, but better safe than sorry
- Made beating Hannah during the rent payment cutscene properly give a check
- Fixed a handful of base game bugs and oddities that don't cause problems in the context of the base game, but sure do in the context of a randomizer
  - The biggest among these: Jasper is no longer erroneously given Gunwhip upon entering the apartment
- Fixed the level 11 location being inaccessible in some (or maybe all?) situations
- Miscellaneous cosmetic fixes
ihyps-v0.3.0.title: IHYPS Archipelago v0.3.0 - Energy Link

v0.1.0.description: Initial release! Proper installation instructions will follow at some point.
v0.1.0.title: I Hate You, Please Suffer Archipelago Initial Release
